access_denied: {e_cancel} You don't have access to this section.
menu_header:
{e_kw_condition} Visibility Conditions Control which subscribers can see and open this menu. Subscribers who don't match are hidden from it entirely.
What you can check: • Subscriber has (or doesn't have) a specific tag • Referral count above a minimum • Previously completed a Stars payment • Enrolled in a sequence • Telegram language matches Logic modes: AND — every condition must pass OR — any one condition is enough {e_open_book} Conditions guide →
Active conditions:
no_conditions: No conditions — fires for all subscribers.
payment_pick_prompt: Select the payment button that must have been paid:
payment_pick_prompt_msg: Select the payment button that must have been paid:
prompt_balance:
Enter minimum balance amount (numbers only):
Examples: 100, 500, 1000 Balance conditions check the subscriber's Stars balance at the moment the keyword is received.
prompt_field_value: Enter the exact value the custom field must equal: The check is case-insensitive.
prompt_payment_button_id: Enter the Button ID that must have been paid: Find the Button ID in your payment button settings.
prompt_referral_count:
Enter minimum number of referrals:
Example: 3 → the subscriber must have referred at least 3 others.
prompt_seq_enrolled: Select the sequence to check enrollment:
prompt_tag:
Enter the tag name to check:
Examples: vip, buyer, trial_started The tag must match exactly — tags are case-sensitive. Leave out the # prefix if you use one visually.
subtitle: Set rules to control who sees this menu or button.
title: Visibility Conditions
toggle_op_toast_and: {e_webhook} Switched to AND — all conditions must match.
toggle_op_toast_or: {e_webhook} Switched to OR — any one condition is enough.
